name: TruLens
description: TruLens — Open-source LLM evaluation and feedback functions framework for measuring RAG and agent quality.

seo.title: TruLens — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: TruLens: TruLens — Open-source LLM evaluation and feedback functions framework for measuring RAG and agent quality.

when_to_use: Evaluating RAG pipeline quality with automated grounding checks
Measuring context relevance and answer faithfulness in LLM apps
Running open-source LLM evals in Python CI pipelines
Debugging retrieval quality with TruLens trace visualizations

pros: Open source with no vendor lock-in
Quick to drop into existing apps
review.verdict: Solid OSS pick for measuring RAG and agent quality, though the wider evals space is consolidating.
review.best_for: RAG and agent teams wanting free, code-first evaluation without a SaaS
review.not_for: Teams that prefer a polished hosted evaluator like Braintrust or LangSmith
